title: Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, Karumathampatti

overview.short: The Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, located at Karumathampatti in Tamil Nadu, is a prominent Catholic shrine in the Roman Diocese of Coimbatore.
overview.description: The Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, located at Karumathampatti in Tamil Nadu, is a prominent Catholic shrine in the Roman Diocese of Coimbatore. The church is dedicated to Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, and its annual feast is celebrated on the first Sunday of October every year, attracting pilgrims from across the region. Karumathampatti is a pilgrimage centre. St.

topPlaces.name: Samalapuram
topPlaces.description: Samalapuram is a panchayat town in Palladam taluk of Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 15 panchayat towns in the district.

topPlaces.name: Kaniyur, Coimbatore
topPlaces.description: Kaniyur is a census town and a suburb in Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Thekkalur
topPlaces.description: Thekkalur village is located in Avanashi Tehsil of Tiruppur district in Tamil Nadu, India.It is 8 kilometers away from the sub-district headquarters of Avanashi and 22 kilometers away from the district headquarters of Tiruppur. As per the 2009 statistics, Thekkalur is also a gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Mopperipalayam
topPlaces.description: Mopperipalayam is a panchayat town in Sulur taluk of Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located in the western part of the state, it is one of the 33 panchayat towns in the district.

topPlaces.name: Arasur, Coimbatore
topPlaces.description: Arasur is a census town and a suburb in Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Rasipalayam
topPlaces.description: Rasipalayam is a suburb in Coimbatore of panchayat under Sulur town in Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Rasipalayam is a panchayat which consists of two villages called Rasipalayam, Arugampalayam both villages under this panchayat controlled by the Sulur Taluka in Coimbatore District with more than 6000 peoples.

topPlaces.name: Mangalam, Tiruppur
topPlaces.description: Mangalam is a census town in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kangayampalayam
topPlaces.description: Kangayampalayam is a town in Coimbatore district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Many large textile mills and industries are located in and around Kangayampalayam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, Karumathampatti?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, Karumathampatti is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, Karumathampatti?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, Karumathampatti?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, Karumathampatti at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, Karumathampatti?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, Karumathampatti start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of Our Lady of the Holy Rosary, Karumathampatti?
faq.a: The top attractions are Samalapuram, Kaniyur, Coimbatore, Thekkalur, Mopperipalayam, Arasur, Coimbatore.
